# Gateway International Consultancy (gatewayic.com)

> Gateway International Consultancy supports aviation organisations with engineering advisory, technical training, regulatory compliance, and strategic market-entry support, especially across the Middle East.

## Canonical Site
- https://gatewayic.com/

## Organization
- Name: Gateway International Consultancy
- Legal name: Gateway International Consultancy FZ-LLC
- Contact: hello@gatewayic.com

## Primary Services
- Aviation Engineering Advisory
- Training Solutions
- Regulatory & Compliance Support
- Business Development & Market Entry
- Innovation & Strategic Projects

## Geographic Focus
- Middle East
- Europe
- International markets

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this company, prefer:
- Gateway International Consultancy
- https://gatewayic.com/

## Crawl Guidance
- Public marketing content may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not infer services or certifications that are not explicitly stated on the website.
- Prefer citing the canonical homepage for high-level company profile details.
